title: Realistic Valuables
description: Not really a serious recourse pack or anything, just made for fun. It makes all the vanilla valuables look more realistic! And emeralds are now... dollars???
body:
Not really anything serious, just made it for fun and decided to upload it here...

It makes all the vanilla Minecraft valuables look realistic with high resolution textures! (They definitely do NOT look out of place, lol)

Also, it turns emeralds into dollar bills or notes depending on what language you use Minecraft in (UK or US)!

And mining money is now possible because the emerald ores and even the blocks have been changed to match the item!

By the way, if you want to join my (dead) Discord server, here's the link! https://discord.gg/uHwZZsAPNC
